title: Krieg Unleashes His Poison Gas Weapon
description: On pages 9–12, the fight against Krieg reaches a moral breaking point as Gin, Sanji, Zeff, and Luffy clash over debt, survival, and strength.
scene: Krieg’s weapons and cruelty force everyone at the Baratie to reveal what they truly value: victory, loyalty, survival, or protecting someone else’s dream.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: So all you have to do is win!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Even if it means using a poison gas bomb!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: One whiff of this'll be enough to render your entire body immobile.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmph! I'll just knock it down into the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I ain't afraid of a little poison gas...

summary: This part pushes the Baratie battle toward its climax by contrasting Krieg’s ruthless power with Luffy and Sanji’s stubborn ideals.
